Class AudioEndpointVisibility

Namespace
WindowsAudioWrapper.Models
Assembly
WindowsAudioWrapper.dll

Captures the persisted visibility state for a Windows audio endpoint.

public sealed class AudioEndpointVisibility

Properties

ContainerId

Gets or sets the endpoint container identifier used as a fallback resolver.

public string ContainerId { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DeviceId

Gets or sets the endpoint identifier used by Windows MMDevice APIs.

public string DeviceId { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Flow

Gets or sets whether the endpoint is playback or recording.

public AudioFlow Flow { get; set; }

Property Value

AudioFlow

FriendlyName

Gets or sets the endpoint friendly name used as a human-readable fallback resolver.

public string FriendlyName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

IsDisabled

Gets or sets whether the endpoint should be disabled/hidden in Windows.

public bool IsDisabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Creates a serializable visibility record from a live endpoint.
